overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA IV showing a character walking through Astoria Park cemetery. The character strolls along paved paths past stone mausoleums and monuments, transitioning from a waterfront promenade through a historic cemetery section to a rocky park area.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along paved path with water view to the right, passing stone monuments

notable_agents.action: sitting on bench facing the water

entered.detail: tall stone wall with grass slope above and trees
river with city skyline and bridge visible in distance
tall rectangular stone monument with decorative top
green wooden bench with seated NPC

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a paved waterfront path in a cemetery park. Stone retaining walls line the left side while the river and city skyline are visible to the right. A lone NPC sits on a bench facing the water as the character passes by stone monuments and willow trees.

events.description: entering enclosed cemetery section with mausoleums and grave monuments

agents.ego_description: walking through cemetery path passing stone mausoleums and crosses on both sides

notable_agents.action: sitting on green bench beside the path

entered.detail: small stone building with green metal door and sloped roof
tall stone cross mounted on pedestal
rough-hewn stone wall with arched doorway

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character enters a more enclosed cemetery section with historic stone mausoleums and crosses. The waterfront view becomes obscured by monuments and trees. An NPC sits on a bench to the right as the character walks between stone walls and tomb structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway transition to rocky park section

events.description: passing through stone archway into rocky park area with boulders

agents.ego_description: walking through stone archway and continuing along winding path between rock formations

entered.detail: gothic-style stone arch entrance with iron gate
steep grassy hill with stone retaining wall above

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes through a stone archway, transitioning from the mausoleum section to a more natural rocky park area. Large boulders appear on the right while grassy slopes rise on the left. The path becomes more winding as it descends toward the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky waterfront path with city views

agents.ego_description: walking along path between rocky outcrops with city skyline visible ahead

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with vegetation
distant skyscrapers and bridge visible across water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding path between large rock formations. The city skyline becomes visible again in the distance across the water. The environment blends natural rocky terrain with the maintained park path as the character continues forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cemetery park that transitions from an open waterfront promenade into a secluded mausoleum section before opening back up into a rocky natural landscape. It begins along a paved path lined with stone retaining walls, passing willow trees and a lone figure on a bench with the city skyline visible across the river. As the path narrows, the view of the water is obscured by a dense arrangement of historic stone mausoleums and crosses that create a more enclosed, somber atmosphere. The scene then shifts as the camera passes through a stone archway, leaving the tombs behind for a winding descent characterized by large boulders and rising grassy slopes. Finally, the environment blends maintained park paths with rugged rock formations as the city skyline emerges once more in the distance across the water.
